response: {"name":"WT Expression Kit (Ambion)","description":"A commercial sample preparation kit by Ambion (Thermo Fisher Scientific) that amplifies and labels total RNA for whole-transcript microarray hybridization, converting as little as 100 ng of total RNA into amplified, labeled cRNA/cDNA targets suitable for Affymetrix GeneChip arrays.","language":null,"github_repo":null,"bioconda_package":null,"pypi_package":null,"cran_package":null,"license_type":"closed_source","open_source_alternative":"affy (Bioconductor R package for Affymetrix microarray preprocessing)","docker_image":null}
